summary: BuildRequest contains no explicit implementation requirements. The diff primarily adds/expands backend canister functionality (profiles/budgets/expenses/notes/access control) and updates global styling/animations and the Home page UI. Backend feature work appears outside the stated non-goals for this change request.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/expanded backend domain features (user profiles, budget categories/budgets/expenses, travel notes, trip ownership tracking) in the Motoko canister.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest lists no requirements and explicitly calls out as non-goals adding new backend features or changing canister state/schema.

hallucinated_features.description: Introduced/expanded backend authorization/access-control role management APIs (initializeAccessControl, getCallerUserRole, assignCallerUserRole, isCallerAdmin) and permission checks around profile access.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by the BuildRequest (and backend feature work is a stated non-goal).

hallucinated_features.description: Global theme overhaul to a warm OKLCH color system plus multiple new animation keyframes/classes and particle-effect styling.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested explicitly (BuildRequest has no requirements); this is additional UI/theming work beyond the stated change request scope.

hallucinated_features.description: Enhanced interactive Home page behaviors beyond navigation (mouse/scroll parallax state, intersection-observer stats counter animation, feature card active state, additional UI sections/components).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested explicitly (BuildRequest has no requirements); represents extra functionality/UI complexity beyond preserving existing auth/navigation behavior.
